docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY SUH, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, SKYLANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SUH, ELAINE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUH, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, SKYLANA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
